title: He made your free video player run smoothly. Now he’s doing that for robots.
snippet: French serial entrepreneur and open-source legend Jean-Baptiste Kempf has been building Kyber, an infrastructure layer to control remote devices in real time.

title: From PGP to Mythos: a brief history of export controls that didn’t stop anyone
snippet: For the last 30 years, stopping the flow of cybersecurity-related software has proven to be ineffective. It's unclear why it would work now with Anthropic’s cybersecurity model Mythos.
